content:
Hello! <:ogier_hello:1333986233126359154> 
I have 2 questions.

Q1: During battle if Lily is in the team there is a visual indicator showing the current number of Lily's endure stacks. Similarly for other awakeners, for example Xu and her Spellbound stacks. Is it possible to add a visual icon during battle for the number of current Vortice HERE IT GOES stacks? Currently it is impossible to know the number of stacks that Vortice has and so impossible to estimate the damage of her exalt.

Q2: If I Rouse Vortice > pursuit 1 > exalt 1 then exalt 1 will benefit from 150% tentacle dmg bonus. If I continue the fight with pursuit 2 > pursuit 3 > pursuit 4 > exalt 2, then exalt 2 will benefit from 450% tentacle dmg bonus correct? Or the bonus only applies to the first exalt after Rouse?  

Thank you, have a great day! <:24_smile:1459073862544130131>

Heya, I don't know if it answers any of your questions but there's actually some information about her stacks in the exalt description in combat. You don't know "how much" stacks you have (like 1,2,3...) but instead it's written as tentacle damage bonus. As far as I know, it stacks up to 1500% damage (at least for me, I don't know if the pursuit, rouse card or exalt level changes anything)
Also I think it's for the whole combat and not only first exalt after rouse because the tentacles damage still goes up after every pursuit after my 1st exalt
I hope I didn't misunderstand anything <:flop2:1356053072924774421>
